data.title: Altadena Community Garden receives grant from California Community Foundation to rebuild after Eaton Fire.
data.description: In Altadena, California, as of September 4, 2025, a significant event unfolded at the Altadena Community Garden. This location has been a hub for hundreds of dedicated gardeners for over five decades, who have meticulously nurtured plants such as tomatoes, lettuce, and basil. However, following the destructive Eaton Fire that ravaged Altadena in January, the focus has shifted. The gardeners are now channeling their efforts towards revitalizing their community through the cultivation of the land. This shift signifies a new chapter in the garden's history, marking a transition from growing produce to fostering unity and regrowth after the calamitous event earlier in the year.

data.title: Sweet Paws Rescue buys 20-acre farm in Boxford, MA for permanent home; was initially to buy a 69-acre property in Bradford.
data.description: Sweet Paws Rescue based in Groveland, Massachusetts has recently acquired a 20-acre farm in Boxford, MA for its rescue operations, marking a significant milestone in the “A Forever Home for Sweet Paws Rescue” capital campaign. The previous plan to purchase a 69-acre property in Bradford was altered due to unspecified circumstances. This new permanent location will facilitate the organization's mission to provide support for animals in need.

data.title: Golden Triangle Ventures (OTC: GTVH) finalizes governance transition, appoints Javier Leal as CEO for unified leadership.
data.description: On August 27, 2025, Golden Triangle Ventures, Inc. (OTC: GTVH) finalized its governance transition after the Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) was revealed. Javier Leal has been officially named the Chief Executive Officer by the Board of Directors. This move aims to establish cohesive leadership, increase accountability, and facilitate the implementation of the company's expansion plan.

data.title: ComEd, League of Chicago Theatres award $230,000 in grants for cultural programs, expanding arts access in northern Illinois.
data.description: In Chicago, ComEd and the League of Chicago Theatres have revealed the newest beneficiaries of the Powering the Arts Grant Program, which promotes cultural inclusivity and art program accessibility in 21 northern Illinois communities. This round of grants showcases the enduring collaboration between ComEd and the League of Chicago Theatres, supporting local nonprofits to enhance arts accessibility. As the program enters its eighth year, the initiative is empowering projects in various communities to foster artistic engagement and outreach.

data.title: AEVEX expands UAS portfolio by acquiring assets from RapidFlight, strengthening position as leader in unmanned systems.
data.description: In Solana Beach, California, AEVEX, a prominent player in innovative unmanned systems, has recently obtained specific assets and intellectual property from RapidFlight, a manufacturer of uncrewed aircraft systems (UAS) based in Manassas, Virginia. This strategic acquisition enhances AEVEX's diverse array of aircraft and mission solutions by introducing new platforms and advanced additive manufacturing capabilities to address changing operational needs. This move solidifies AEVEX's standing within the UAS sector, further establishing them as one of the country's top producers.

data.title: Westwood Financial bought 80,599 sq ft Shops at Stone Creek in Rockwall, Texas, anchored by Tom Thumb. Center features diverse tenant mix.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Westwood Financial, a prominent retail real estate investment company with almost six decades of experience, has purchased the Shops at Stone Creek in Rockwall, Texas. This shopping center spans 80,599 square feet and is anchored by Tom Thumb, along with a connected fuel center. The property is fully occupied, housing a blend of service-focused and dining tenants. The acquisition strengthens Westwood Financial's portfolio with a prime retail asset in a thriving location.

data.title: Wall Street gains on rate cut bets as job data shows 54k jobs added in August, down from 106k in July. Fed rate cut odds at nearly 100%.
data.description: Wall Street showed an increase in risk appetite on Thursday, driven by indications that the labor market cooled in August, solidifying expectations for the Federal Reserve to initiate interest rate cuts at the meeting on Sept. 17. The ADP National Employment Report revealed a mere 54,000 job additions in August, a significant drop from 106,000 in July and well below the anticipated 65,000. With job growth decelerating, economists are now predicting the upcoming official nonfarm payrolls report to exhibit just 75,000 new jobs—a marginal increase from July's 73,000, below the standard needed for economic sustenance. In response, the likelihood of a rate cut surged, with markets foreseeing an almost certain 25-basis-point cut by the Fed this month, according to CME FedWatch Tool data. Odds for a subsequent cut before the year ends rose to 90%. Treasury yields slackened as well, seen in the 30-year yield decline.

data.title: Figma Inc. (NYSE: FIG) stock plunges 19% after Q2 results: Revenue $249.64M (41% YoY increase); earnings 8 cents/share.
data.description: Figma Inc. saw its stock (NYSE: FIG) plummet by nearly 19% on Thursday after revealing its second-quarter financial results. The company reported impressive revenue of $249.64 million, surpassing the anticipated $228.2 million, marking a significant 41% rise from $177.20 million in the same period last year. Adjusted earnings for the quarter came in at 8 cents per share, falling short of the expected 18 cents per share but showing growth from the 7 cents per share reported in the previous year's quarter. Additionally, Figma disclosed a $91 million stake in a Bitcoin ETF, part of its $1.6 billion treasury. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: LDO price surges by 0.76% to $1.21 on Lido DAO's SRv3 validator upgrade news, with mixed technical signals.
data.description: The price of LDO has surged to $1.21 following the announcement of Lido DAO's SRv3 validator upgrade. Despite this, technical indicators are displaying conflicting signals, as bullish investors work to maintain crucial support levels.

data.title: Impact Health Sharing offering stable rates for over 5 years, saving members up to 50% monthly. $275 million saved and shared in medical bills.
data.description: In Davie, Florida, Impact Health Sharing is revolutionizing the healthcare industry by providing cost-effective, member-centric, and technology-driven healthcare solutions. Despite the upward trend in healthcare expenses, Impact Health Sharing has maintained consistent rates for the past five years, distinguishing itself from competitors who are increasing their rates. This commitment has allowed members to enjoy added benefits at no additional expense. With savings of up to 50% monthly, members have collectively saved and shared over $275 million in qualifying medical expenses to date. Furthermore, healthcare providers also benefit from Impact's approach, receiving prompt and leading-edge payments for their services.

data.title: ANAB forms Digital Technology Initiative and AI Task Force to boost digital transformation, reaching across organization.
data.description: In New York on September 4, 2025, ANAB unveiled its Digital Technology Initiative (DTI) aimed at driving a collective digital transformation vision within the company. The initiative focuses on streamlining service delivery to enhance efficiency. This strategic move marks a significant step towards embracing digital advancements and improving operational processes.

data.title: Stephen Miran, former economic adviser to Trump, faces backlash for wanting to return to the White House after struggling to assure independence of Federal Reserve in fiery confirmation hearing on Thursday.
data.description: During a heated confirmation hearing on Thursday, Stephen Miran, a former top economic adviser to the president, faced challenges in convincing critics of his commitment to preserving the central bank's independence.

data.title: Bitcoin's price drops below $110K in 2% daily decrease, failing to surpass $112K resistance amid weak Wall Street opening.
data.description: Despite the discouraging US jobs data, Bitcoin remains resilient and is making another push to surpass the $112,000 resistance level. This comes as Wall Street experiences a lackluster open.

data.title: Eimskip to add two new 2,280 TEU container vessels for transportation services between Iceland, Rotterdam, and UK as part of ten-year time-charter through ElbFeeder.
data.description: The Board of Directors of Eimskipafélag Íslands hf. has given the green light to newbuild contracts for two container vessels of 2,280 TEU each. These ships will be chartered for a decade via ElbFeeder, a German affiliate of Eimskip. The purpose of these vessels is to offer shipping services connecting Reykjavík, Iceland, with Rotterdam and Teesport in the UK, which are part of the Company’s established Blue Line route.
